Defines constants and a function for managing shutter transition animations in the compositor.

# Purpose
This header file defines constants and a function related to animation transitions in a compositor system. It specifies the durations for different sections of a shutter transition animation, where `SHUTTER_TRANSITION_FIRST_DURATION_MS` and `SHUTTER_TRANSITION_SECOND_DURATION_MS` represent the time taken for moving the old application off-screen and bringing the new application on-screen, respectively. The total duration of the animation is defined by `SHUTTER_TRANSITION_DURATION_MS`. The function `compositor_shutter_transition_get` is declared to retrieve a `CompositorTransition` object based on the specified transition direction and color. This code is intended to be included in other C++ files that require these transition functionalities.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `services/common/compositor/compositor.h`
